untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of exponential decay parameter θ and half-life (ln(2)/θ) from time-series analysis to determine optimal holding periods. These are derived statistical measures not available as pre-computed indicators in the allowed list. The exact spread definition, deviation threshold, and reversion target are marked AUTHOR_SILENT. Bollinger Bands used as proxy for mean-reversion detection, but cannot replicate the precise half-life-based exit timing without custom indicator support.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy translation using Bollinger Bands (bb_pct_b extremes near 0 or 1 indicate significant deviation from mean) and mean-reversion exit when price crosses bb_middle. However, this fundamentally cannot capture the signal's core mechanic: calculating half-life from θ and using it to set precise holding periods. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as entry conditions do not specify LONG vs SHORT. Target regime set to RANGING as mean-reversion strategies require non-trending markets. Parameters for threshold, sharpe, and backtest period are AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be operationalized.
